name: build-shopify-theme
description: Controlled Shopify theme sections and asset configuration. Consumes store_blueprint.theme_sections and store_blueprint.assets and writes theme asset files to the targeted Shopify theme. Requires explicit opt-in via runtime_config.allow_theme_writes: true. Supports dry-run mode (default when allow_theme_writes is not set).
implementation_note: Phase 7B.3 is scaffolded but not yet deployed. The workflow JSON (build-shopify-theme.n8n.json) is a non-live scaffold. Live writes require allow_theme_writes: true in runtime_config and a verified non-production theme target.

fields.runtime_config: resolved runtime config — must include shopify_shop_url; optional: shopify_theme_id (defaults to active theme), allow_theme_writes (default: false)
fields.store_blueprint: Phase 7A output — uses theme_sections[] and assets[]
fields.content_strategy: Phase 6b output — used for section copy generation
fields.offer_architecture: Phase 5 output — used for value prop sections

fields.theme_id: Shopify theme ID that was targeted (null in dry_run)
fields.sections_written: count of theme section asset keys written
fields.assets_written: count of other theme assets written (logo, favicon, images)
fields.dry_run: true when allow_theme_writes is not set — no writes performed
fields.safety_notes: confirms which theme was targeted and dry-run status

shopify_api_operations.purpose: List all themes to find active/target theme ID
List existing theme assets to check what already exists
Create or update a theme asset file (idempotent by key)

section_write_strategy.approach: Write section JSON files to the theme. Each theme_sections entry becomes one asset PUT. Section files follow Shopify Dawn/OS 2.0 section schema.
section_write_strategy.note: Does NOT modify templates/*.json or config/settings_data.json in this phase — section files only.

theme_targeting.opt_in_flag: runtime_config.allow_theme_writes: true required for any writes
theme_targeting.dry_run_default: When allow_theme_writes is absent or false, return PHASE_7B3_DRY_RUN with plan only

safety_model.opt_in_required: allow_theme_writes: true must be explicitly set in runtime_config to perform any writes
safety_model.dry_run_default: Without opt-in, the workflow validates, plans, and returns PHASE_7B3_DRY_RUN — no Shopify writes
safety_model.no_template_overwrites: This phase DOES NOT modify templates/*.json or config/settings_data.json
safety_model.no_deletes: No existing theme files are deleted
safety_model.no_active_theme_publish: Workflow does not publish themes or change which theme is active
safety_model.idempotent: PUT to /themes/{id}/assets is inherently idempotent — repeated writes are safe
safety_model.recommended_workflow: 1) Run with dry_run (default), review plan, 2) Set allow_theme_writes: true, 3) Target development theme, 4) Verify visually, 5) Manually switch to active theme

planned_node_pattern: 13-node (Trigger → Validate → IF dry_run → [Dry Run Plan Return] | [Fetch Theme → Fetch Assets → Merge → Build Write Plan → IF has_sections → Write Section Assets → Write Other Assets → Merge → Summary])

credentials.name: Shopify SuppliedTech Admin
credentials.note: Same credential as Phase 7B.1 and 7B.2. Replace credential id if deploying to a different n8n instance.

orchestration_integration.note: PHASE_7B3_DRY_RUN is treated as non-fatal success — the orchestrator continues.
